_comment: NPC: Fisherman Mo (渔夫莫). INFERRED: Nan Dou City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Fisherman Mo

perception_tiers.mortal: A mortal of Nan Dou City

note: INFERRED: Nan Dou City mortal. quiet, observant, knows the waterways.
initiation_lines: The river tells you things if you listen. Last night it carried the sound of hammering from beneath the warehouse. Tunnels, maybe.
I fish at dawn and dusk. The stars are clearest then. The temple astrologer says the Southern Dipper is my patron. I say it just means I wake up early.
Coal for my cooking fire, planks for my boat repairs. If you have spare materials, I will trade fish — or information about what floats downriver.
A body washed up last month. A cultivator, from the look of the robes. The guard captain said it was a river accident. I am not so sure.

sect_tasks.description: Mo: 'I need coal for my fire and planks for my boat. The river fish are biting well — I can pay in emeralds from my catch.'
Mo looks at the water: 'I see things on the river at night. Lights under the warehouse. Boats that carry no fishing nets. Bring me sticks and coal for a signal fire and I will tell you the schedule.'
